news.title: With $3.5B in fresh capital, Kleiner Perkins is going all in on AI
news.summary: The fundraise includes $1 billion for investing in early-stage startups, and $2.5 billion for late-stage growth businesses.

news.title: OpenAI’s Sora was the creepiest app on your phone — now it’s shutting down
news.summary: Though the underlying Sora 2 video- and audio-generation model is scarily impressive, there was not sustained interest in an AI-only social feed.

news.title: Kentucky woman rejects $26M offer to turn her farm into a data center
news.summary: A "major artificial intelligence company" reportedly offered a Kentucky family $26 million to build a data center on their farm.

news.title: Anthropic hands Claude Code more control, but keeps it on a leash
news.summary: Anthropic’s new auto mode for Claude Code lets AI execute tasks with fewer approvals, reflecting a broader shift toward more autonomous tools that balance speed with safety through built-in safeguards

news.title: Spotify tests new tool to stop AI slop from being attributed to real artists
news.summary: The idea behind the new tool is to give artists more control over which tracks are associated with their name on Spotify.

news.title: Databricks bought two startups to underpin its new AI security product
news.summary: With an overflowing war chest from its recent $5 billion raise, Databricks is buying startups and looking for more. It acquired Antimatter and SiftD.ai.

news.title: Arm is releasing the first in-house chip in its 35-year history
news.summary: Arm is producing its own CPU for the first time. It developed the CPU with Meta, which is also the chip's first customer.

news.title: OpenAI’s plans to make ChatGPT more like Amazon aren’t going so well
news.summary: OpenAI says it's moving away from Instant Checkout, which allowed users to buy items directly through the ChatGPT interface.

products.name: Claude Computer Use
products.tagline: Enable Claude to use your computer to complete tasks

products.name: Kitty Points Leaderboard
products.tagline: Find interesting community members and see how you stack up

products.name: Cekura
products.tagline: Observe and analyze your voice and chat AI agents

trends.desc: AI gains autonomy while balancing speed and safety.

trends.title: Massive VC Investment Flows Into AI
trends.desc: Top VCs raise huge funds to back AI startups.
trends.ref: With $3.5B in fresh capital, Kleiner Perkins is going all in on AI

trends.title: Platforms Regulate AI Misattribution
trends.desc: Services stop fake AI content linked to real artists.
trends.ref: Spotify tests new tool to stop AI slop from being attributed to real artists
